channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Norwood Road SE27 outside number 278 pl, 12th July
item.description:
Norwood Road SE27 outside number 278 please see picture…..various issues…. food recycling bin damaged, instruction on food recycling bin need replacing if bin repairable and footpath needs repairing. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to multi teams who need to deal with this for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle, 12th July
item.description:
Vehicle broke down on Saturday and has been left here since. Windows are wide open and it's also obstructing entrance and restricting already limited parking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hurst Place, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Norwood Road SE27 number 268 shop shutter, 12th July
item.description:
Norwood Road SE27 number 268 (next to Ullswater Road junction) grey shop shutter graffiti tagged. (Think Co-op funerals may be shut.) Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin and picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 268, Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gutter and pavement covered in litter, 12th July
item.description:
Combermere rd covered in litter. Persistent daily littering issue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley, 12th July
item.description:
Trolley left on pavement plus excess rubbish along road again. Photo of trolley shows looking towards main road from Bromley to Shortlands

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Blyth Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere, 12th July
item.description:
There is a large amount of rubbish on the grass and on the pavement either side of the street near the convenience store. Looks awful.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Norwood Road SE27 outside number 268 (, 12th July
item.description:
Norwood Road SE27 outside number 268 (at Ullswater Road junction) green plastic road sweeper’s rubbish bag bin tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin and picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 268, Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped sofa base and other thing, 12th July
item.description:
End of Fendyke road again. Why are there no cameras this is happening weekly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendyke Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car Crash Debris, 12th July
item.description:
Lots of debris, large and small pieces, from a car crash that occurred on 12 July.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tudor Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green waste bin belonging to Saltash Road needs removing from Regency Way, 12th July
item.description:
Since my previous report ref: 9454569. Whereby the green waste bin was not removed, this is now being used as a dumping ground for passers by. The waste bin belongs to Saltash Road and has been dumped in Regency Way and each day move and more rubbish is being fly tipped there. It is on the green verge opposite 31 Regency Way, It is now a fly tipping eyesore!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regency Way, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uncontrolled Waste HMO Property, 12th July
item.description:
This HMO property at 158 Swingatel Lane is generating uncontrolled household waste due to inadequate refuse storage. The wheelie bin is overflowing, the lid cannot be closed, rubbish is protruding from the bin, and litter is already accumulating on the public pavement. This is not an isolated concern. Local residents raised objections during the planning process that the property would have insufficient waste management arrangements, and these concerns now appear to have materialised. I request that the Council investigate this matter urgently and take appropriate enforcement action to ensure adequate waste storage is provided and the surrounding public highway is kept free from refuse.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Swingate Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture outside substation, 12th July
item.description:
Dumped chest of drawers outside substation and other waste
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Commercial Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken tarmac and cracking after speed hump raised manhole., 12th July
item.description:
There are numerous dips in BYRON DRIVE where the Tarmac has sunken down the road leaving the man holes raised elevated. The one in the photos is particularly bad and the front bumpers on your vehicle scuff the road where the manhole is raised due to the sunken tarmac around it as you come over the speed bump the front of your vehicle dips down see white scuff marks on tarmac in photos provided thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Byron Drive, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More Flytipping, 12th July
item.description:
Domestic waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: EV charging point on lamp post near 50 Hurst Road, 12th July
item.description:
EV charging point cover is off and exposing cables. It has been like this for some time. It could be dangerous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 12th July
item.description:
Please clean it up Lots of litter from the broken by foxes rubbish bag (night before)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Bird poop bench by Danson Park Lake south side, 12th July
item.description:
Bird poop bench by Danson Park Lake south side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lakeside Close, Blendon, Greater London

item.title: Lots of potholes in junction near North Greenwich Station, 12th July
item.description:
There are major potholes at the junction between Edmund Halley Way and W Parkway, next to North Greenwich Station, which are very dangerous for all vehicles and passengers inside and can cause damage.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edmund Halley Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 12th July
item.description:
Please see another overflowing bin. This happens now every weekend.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 12th July
item.description:
Lovely people dumping their rubbish without a care. Encourages vermin, just like the people who dumped it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
